name: AROS Retail Operations

listing.oneLineSummary: A business gateway where operators connect their apps and run store operations from chat.

reviewDemo.credentials: No real POS credentials or customer data

operator.audience: business owners, managers, staff, and operators
operator.purpose: run the business through connected apps, MCP tools, POS data, approvals, and audit

customer.auth: public projection reads; customer session for cart, checkout, order status, delivery, loyalty, or restricted products
customer.purpose: search products, promotions, business hours, pickup, delivery, cart, and hosted checkout

submissionBlockers: Register ChatGPT OAuth client in shre-id after ChatGPT shows the exact callback ID
Run production token test and then set AROS_MCP_DEMO_MODE=false
Counsel signoff for public legal pages
Create synthetic demo tenant and reviewer login
